{"node-1773534523141":{"S3GlueParquetTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"EvaluationContext":"EvaluateDataQuality_node1773533390015","IsEnabled":true},"Compression":"snappy","Inputs":["node-1773534514932"],"Name":"Amazon S3","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://powerbi-glue-buckett/silver/sales/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}},"node-1773534227241":{"DropNullFields":{"Inputs":["node-1773534098500"],"Name":"Drop Null Fields","NullCheckBoxList":{"IsEmpty":true,"IsNegOne":false},"NullTextList":[]}},"node-1773534098500":{"S3ParquetSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":"s3://powerbi-glue-buckett/bronze/Sales/run-1773529405250-part-block-0-r-00000-snappy.parquet"},"Exclusions":[],"Name":"Amazon S3","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"orderdate","Type":"string"},{"Name":"stockdate","Type":"string"},{"Name":"ordernumber","Type":"string"},{"Name":"productkey","Type":"string"},{"Name":"customerkey","Type":"string"},{"Name":"territorykey","Type":"string"},{"Name":"orderlineitem","Type":"string"},{"Name":"orderquantity","Type":"string"}]}],"Paths":["s3://powerbi-glue-buckett/bronze/Sales/"],"Recurse":true}},"node-1773534361993":{"CustomCode":{"ClassName":"MyTransform","Code":"from awsglue.dynamicframe import DynamicFrame, DynamicFrameCollection
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, when

# Get input DynamicFrame
dyf = dfc.select(list(dfc.keys())[0])

# Convert to DataFrame
df = dyf.toDF()

# Create quality_type column
df = df.withColumn(
    "Quality Type",
    when(col("OrderQuantity") == 1, "Single Item")
    .when(col("OrderQuantity") > 1, "Multiple Item")
)

# Convert back to DynamicFrame
new_dyf = DynamicFrame.fromDF(df, glueContext, "new_dyf")

return DynamicFrameCollection({"output": new_dyf}, glueContext)","Inputs":["node-1773534272677"],"Name":"Custom Transform","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"OrderDate","Type":"date"},{"Name":"StockDate","Type":"date"},{"Name":"OrderNumber","Type":"string"},{"Name":"ProductKey","Type":"int"},{"Name":"CustomerKey","Type":"int"},{"Name":"TerritoryKey","Type":"int"},{"Name":"OrderLineItem","Type":"int"},{"Name":"OrderQuantity","Type":"int"},{"Name":"Quality Type","Type":"string"}]}]}},"node-1773534514932":{"SelectFromCollection":{"Index":0,"Inputs":["node-1773534361993"],"Name":"Select From Collection"}},"node-1773534272677":{"ApplyMapping":{"Inputs":["node-1773534227241"],"Mapping":[{"Dropped":false,"FromPath":["OrderDate"],"FromType":"string","ToKey":"OrderDate","ToType":"date"},{"Dropped":false,"FromPath":["StockDate"],"FromType":"string","ToKey":"StockDate","ToType":"date"},{"Dropped":false,"FromPath":["OrderNumber"],"FromType":"string","ToKey":"OrderNumber","ToType":"string"},{"Dropped":false,"FromPath":["ProductKey"],"FromType":"string","ToKey":"ProductKey","ToType":"int"},{"Dropped":false,"FromPath":["CustomerKey"],"FromType":"string","ToKey":"CustomerKey","ToType":"int"},{"Dropped":false,"FromPath":["TerritoryKey"],"FromType":"string","ToKey":"TerritoryKey","ToType":"int"},{"Dropped":false,"FromPath":["OrderLineItem"],"FromType":"string","ToKey":"OrderLineItem","ToType":"int"},{"Dropped":false,"FromPath":["OrderQuantity"],"FromType":"string","ToKey":"OrderQuantity","ToType":"int"}],"Name":"Change Schema"}}}
